title: SI Sponsored Context
description: Declaration attached to sponsored context delivered into an SI host boundary. Separates the economic accountability fact (`paying_principal`) from the host's receipt/acceptance record, which is carried separately by si-sponsored-context-receipt.json.

paying_principal.description: Economic accountability fact: the brand that funded or sponsored this context, with optional account/operator context. This identifies who paid for the sponsored context; it is distinct from the host's later receipt and use commitment.

brand.description: Brand economically accountable for the sponsored context.

account.description: Optional seller-assigned account context for the paying principal. This intentionally carries only an account_id so the canonical economic principal remains paying_principal.brand.

account_id.description: Seller-assigned account identifier for the paying principal.

operator.description: Domain of the operator acting for the paying principal, when different from the brand domain.

display_name.description: Human-readable label for disclosure rendering. The canonical identity remains the brand/account reference.

context_use.description: Declared host-side use mode for this sponsored context.

disclosure_obligation.description: Disclosure obligation the receiving host must either accept and satisfy or reject before using this sponsored context. This is a declared obligation and audit input, not a protocol-level legal determination.

required.description: Whether the declaring party requires disclosure for this sponsored context.

label_text.description: Disclosure label text the host should render when disclosure is required.

timing.description: When the disclosure must be presented relative to the sponsored context's influence.

enumDescriptions.before_use: Disclose before the host uses the sponsored context.
enumDescriptions.at_first_influenced_output: Disclose at the first host output influenced by the sponsored context.
enumDescriptions.near_each_influenced_output: Disclose near each output that presents, compares, or is materially influenced by the sponsored context.

proximity.description: Where the disclosure should appear relative to the affected output.

enumDescriptions.near_rendered_unit: Disclosure should appear near the sponsored card, answer block, handoff, or other rendered unit.
enumDescriptions.near_influenced_output: Disclosure should appear near the host output that was shaped by the sponsored context, even if no single rendered unit is the ad.

jurisdictions.description: Jurisdictions where this declared disclosure obligation applies.

declared_at.description: When this sponsored-context declaration was made.

declared_by.description: Agent or service that attached the declaration.

agent_url.description: HTTPS URL of the declaring agent or service.
